steps.title: Identify the critical baseline
steps.content: The passage explicitly states the table shows temperatures according to a model that assumes the absence of atmosphere. HD 80653 b is shown at 2,300 kelvins under this no-atmosphere condition.

steps.title: Reason about atmospheric effects
steps.content:
Adding an atmosphere would alter the baseline surface temperature.

An atmosphere moderates extreme temperatures, so the 2,300 kelvins shown would decrease with atmospheric presence.

Choices A and C address mass, which doesn't vary with atmospheric presence; choice B specifies 1,400 kelvins without basis.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
